Block.Para: Second Session, Forty-first Parliament,
62-63 Elizabeth II, 2013-2014

STATUTES OF CANADA 2014
CHAPTER 35
An Act to amend the Canada National Parks Act (N脙隆脙隆ts芒聙聶ihch芒聙聶oh National Park Reserve of Canada)
ASSENTED TO
16th DECEMBER, 2014
BILL S-5

Available on the Parliament of Canada Web Site at the following address:
http://www.parl.gc.ca
SUMMARY
This enactment amends the Canada National Parks Act to establish N脙隆脙隆ts芒聙聶ihch芒聙聶oh National Park Reserve of Canada.

Bill_Part.RunningHead_E: Canada National Parks (N脙隆脙隆ts芒聙聶ihch芒聙聶oh National Park Reserve of Canada)

Block.Para: 62-63 ELIZABETH II
芒聙聰芒聙聰芒聙聰芒聙聰芒聙聰芒聙聰
CHAPTER 35
An Act to amend the Canada National Parks Act (N脙隆脙隆ts芒聙聶ihch芒聙聶oh National Park Reserve of Canada)
[Assented to 16th December, 2014]
Her Majesty, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate and House of Commons of Canada, enacts as follows:
SHORT TITLE
1. This Act may be cited as the N脙隆脙隆ts芒聙聶ihch芒聙聶oh National Park Reserve Act.
CANADA NATIONAL PARKS ACT
2. The portion of subsection 24(2) of the Canada National Parks Act before paragraph (a) is replaced by the following:

(2) Every person who contravenes any provision of the regulations other than a provision designated by regulations made under paragraph 16(1)(y), any condition of a permit, licence or other authorizing instrument issued under the regulations or under subsection 41.1(3) or (4) or 41.4(2) or (3) or any order or direction given by a superintendent, park warden or enforcement officer under subsection 41.1(3) or (4) or 41.4(2) or (3) is guilty of an offence and liable
3. Section 39 of the Act is replaced by the following:
39. Subject to sections 40 to 41.4, this Act applies to a park reserve as if it were a park.
4. Subsection 41.1(4) of the Act is replaced by the following:

(4) The Minister may issue, amend, renew, suspend or cancel 芒聙聰 or approve the assignment of 芒聙聰 licences for the use of waters in the expansion area for the purposes of the mining access roads referred to in subsection (2) and, in relation to those licences, subsections 31(3) and 72.03(1), (5) and (6), sections 72.04, 72.1, 72.11, 72.12 and 72.14, subsections 85(1) and (2) and sections 85.1 to 85.3, 86.1 to 87, 89 and 93.2 of the Mackenzie Valley Resource Management Act and the regulations made under that Act apply, with any adaptations that may be necessary, as if the references in those provisions to the federal Minister or a board were references to the Minister responsible for the Parks Canada Agency and the references in those provisions to an inspector were references to the superintendent of the Park Reserve, a park warden or an enforcement officer designated for the purposes of this subsection.
5. The Act is amended by adding the following after section 41.3:

Block.MarginalNote: Powers of Minister 芒聙聰 N脙隆脙隆ts芒聙聶ihch芒聙聶oh National Park Reserve of Canada
Block.Para: 41.4 (1) The Minister may enter into leases or licences of occupation of, and easements over, public lands in N脙隆脙隆ts芒聙聶ihch芒聙聶oh National Park Reserve of Canada for the purposes of

(a) a mining access road following the existing route from Tungsten to Howard芒聙聶s Pass and any alteration to or deviation from that route, including the sites of storage and other facilities connected with that road; or
(b) a mining access road from the road referred to in paragraph (a) to the mineral claims in the area of Lened Creek that are in existence on the day on which this section comes into force.

(2) The Minister may issue, amend, renew, suspend or cancel 芒聙聰 or approve the assignment of 芒聙聰 permits and authorizations for the use of public lands in N脙隆脙隆ts芒聙聶ihch芒聙聶oh National Park Reserve of Canada for the purposes of the mining access roads referred to in subsection (1) and, in relation to those permits and authorizations, subsection 31(3) and sections 59, 62, 71 and 85 to 87 of the Mackenzie Valley Resource Management Act and the regulations made under that Act 芒聙聰 other than any regulations respecting time limits and public hearings 芒聙聰 apply, with any adaptations that may be necessary, as if the references in those provisions to the federal Minister or a board were references to the Minister responsible for the Parks Canada Agency and the references in those provisions to an inspector were references to the superintendent of N脙隆脙隆ts芒聙聶ihch芒聙聶oh National Park Reserve of Canada, a park warden or an enforcement officer designated for the purposes of this subsection.

(3) The Minister may issue, amend, renew, suspend or cancel 芒聙聰 or approve the assignment of 芒聙聰 licences for the use of waters in N脙隆脙隆ts芒聙聶ihch芒聙聶oh National Park Reserve of Canada for the purposes of the mining access roads referred to in subsection (1) and, in relation to those licences, subsections 31(3) and 72.03(1), (5) and (6), sections 72.04, 72.1, 72.11, 72.12 and 72.14, subsections 85(1) and (2) and sections 85.1 to 85.3, 86.1 to 87, 89 and 93.2 of the Mackenzie Valley Resource Management Act and the regulations made under that Act apply, with any adaptations that may be necessary, as if the references in those provisions to the federal Minister or a board were references to the Minister responsible for the Parks Canada Agency and the references in those provisions to an inspector were references to the superintendent of N脙隆脙隆ts芒聙聶ihch芒聙聶oh National Park Reserve of Canada, a park warden or an enforcement officer designated for the purposes of this subsection.

(4) Permits and authorizations for the use of land and licences for the use of waters, issued under the Mackenzie Valley Resource Management Act, and licences for the use of waters issued under the Northwest Territories Waters Act, that are in effect on the coming into force of this section in respect of public lands in N脙隆脙隆ts芒聙聶ihch芒聙聶oh National Park Reserve of Canada continue in effect according to their terms and conditions.

(5) For the purposes of this Act, the permits and authorizations for the use of land referred to in subsection (4) are deemed to have been issued under subsection (2) and the licences for the use of waters referred to in subsection (4) are deemed to have been issued under subsection (3).

Block.MarginalNote: Continuation 芒聙聰 leases, easements and licences of occupation
Block.Para: (6) Existing leases, easements and licences of occupation relating to public lands in N脙隆脙隆ts芒聙聶ihch芒聙聶oh National Park Reserve of Canada are continued under this Act in accordance with their terms and conditions, which prevail over this Act to the extent of any inconsistency between them.

Block.MarginalNote: Renewals 芒聙聰 leases and licences of occupation
Block.Para: (7) Those leases and licences of occupation may be renewed in accordance with their terms and conditions. If a lease or licence of occupation does not provide for its renewal, then it may be renewed in accordance with this Act.

(8) For the purposes of subsections 5(1) and 6(2), leases, easements, licences of occupation, land use permits and authorizations and water licences relating to public lands in N脙隆脙隆ts芒聙聶ihch芒聙聶oh National Park Reserve of Canada are deemed not to encumber or affect title to those lands, but if those lands become a park they continue in effect according to their terms and conditions.
(9) After any public lands in N脙隆脙隆ts芒聙聶ihch芒聙聶oh National Park Reserve of Canada become a park, this section continues to apply in respect of those lands with any adaptations that may be necessary.
6. Schedule 2 to the Act is amended by adding the following after the description of Kluane National Park Reserve of Canada:
N脙聛脙聛TS芒聙聶IHCH芒聙聶OH NATIONAL PARK RESERVE OF CANADA
In the Northwest Territories;
All of Parts I and II described as follows:
Part I

Commencing at the point of intersection of the Yukon/Northwest Territories Boundary with the southerly boundary of the Sahtu Settlement Area (as described in the Sahtu Dene and Metis Comprehensive Land Claim Agreement, Volume 1, Appendix A) at approximate latitude 62脗掳06芒聙虏39芒聙鲁 North and approximate longitude 129脗掳10芒聙虏00芒聙鲁 West;

Thence northeasterly along the southerly boundary of the Sahtu Settlement Area to a point on the southerly boundary of the Sahtu Settlement Area at latitude 62脗掳09芒聙虏40芒聙鲁 North and approximate longitude 129脗掳00芒聙虏36芒聙鲁 West;
Thence northwesterly in a straight line to a point at latitude 62脗掳11芒聙虏49芒聙鲁 North and longitude 129脗掳05芒聙虏10芒聙鲁 West;
Thence northeasterly in a straight line to a point at latitude 62脗掳15芒聙虏47芒聙鲁 North and longitude 129脗掳04芒聙虏05芒聙鲁 West;
Thence northeasterly in a straight line to a point at latitude 62脗掳18芒聙虏00芒聙鲁 North and longitude 128脗掳56芒聙虏38芒聙鲁 West;
Thence southeasterly in a straight line to a point at latitude 62脗掳17芒聙虏28芒聙鲁 North and longitude 128脗掳54芒聙虏04芒聙鲁 West;
Thence southeasterly in a straight line to a point on a southerly boundary of the Sahtu Settlement Area at longitude 128脗掳48芒聙虏29芒聙鲁 West and approximate latitude 62脗掳13芒聙虏30芒聙鲁 North;

Thence northeasterly along the southerly boundary of the Sahtu Settlement Area to a point on the southerly boundary of the Sahtu Settlement Area at longitude 128脗掳36芒聙虏58芒聙鲁 West and approximate latitude 62脗掳17芒聙虏06芒聙鲁 North;
Thence northwesterly in a straight line to a point at latitude 62脗掳20芒聙虏10芒聙鲁 North and longitude 128脗掳42芒聙虏25芒聙鲁 West;
Thence northwesterly in a straight line to a point at latitude 62脗掳23芒聙虏38芒聙鲁 North and longitude 128脗掳56芒聙虏10芒聙鲁 West;
Thence southwesterly in a straight line to a point at latitude 62脗掳20芒聙虏20芒聙鲁 North and longitude 129脗掳02芒聙虏28芒聙鲁 West;
Thence northwesterly in a straight line to a point at latitude 62脗掳22芒聙虏52芒聙鲁 North and longitude 129脗掳04芒聙虏55芒聙鲁 West;
Thence westerly in a straight line to a point at latitude 62脗掳23芒聙虏02芒聙鲁 North and longitude 129脗掳12芒聙虏50芒聙鲁 West;
Thence southerly in a straight line to the intersection of latitude 62脗掳22芒聙虏13芒聙鲁 North with the Yukon/Northwest Territories Boundary at approximate longitude 129脗掳13芒聙虏08芒聙鲁 West;
Thence generally southerly along the Yukon/Northwest Territories Boundary to the point of commencement.
Said parcel containing an area of approximately 515 square kilometres.

All coordinates are referred to the 1983 North American Datum, Canadian Spatial Reference System (NAD83 CSRS) and any references to straight lines mean points joined directly on the NAD83 Universal Transverse Mercator (UTM) projection plane surface.
Part II
Commencing at the intersection of the Yukon/Northwest Territories Boundary with latitude 62脗掳45芒聙虏32芒聙鲁 North at approximate longitude 129脗掳38芒聙虏15芒聙鲁 West;
Thence easterly in a straight line to a point at latitude 62脗掳45芒聙虏18芒聙鲁 North and longitude 129脗掳32芒聙虏13芒聙鲁 West;
Thence southeasterly in a straight line to a point at latitude 62脗掳43芒聙虏44芒聙鲁 North and longitude 129脗掳30芒聙虏18芒聙鲁 West;
Thence southeasterly in a straight line to a point at latitude 62脗掳43芒聙虏01芒聙鲁 North and longitude 129脗掳28芒聙虏52芒聙鲁 West;
Thence easterly in a straight line to a point at latitude 62脗掳42芒聙虏50芒聙鲁 North and longitude 129脗掳26芒聙虏46芒聙鲁 West;
Thence southeasterly in a straight line to a point at latitude 62脗掳40芒聙虏34芒聙鲁 North and longitude 129脗掳21芒聙虏25芒聙鲁 West;
Thence easterly in a straight line to a point at latitude 62脗掳40芒聙虏23芒聙鲁 North and longitude 129脗掳18芒聙虏11芒聙鲁 West;
Thence southeasterly in a straight line to a point at latitude 62脗掳38芒聙虏06芒聙鲁 North and longitude 129脗掳16芒聙虏01芒聙鲁 West;
Thence southeasterly in a straight line to a point at latitude 62脗掳35芒聙虏20芒聙鲁 North and longitude 129脗掳12芒聙虏00芒聙鲁 West;
Thence southeasterly in a straight line to a point at latitude 62脗掳34芒聙虏48芒聙鲁 North and longitude 129脗掳04芒聙虏30芒聙鲁 West;
Thence easterly in a straight line to a point at latitude 62脗掳34芒聙虏52芒聙鲁 North and longitude 128脗掳58芒聙虏55芒聙鲁 West;
Thence southeasterly in a straight line to a point at latitude 62脗掳33芒聙虏25芒聙鲁 North and longitude 128脗掳55芒聙虏05芒聙鲁 West;
Thence southeasterly in a straight line to a point at latitude 62脗掳31芒聙虏59芒聙鲁 North and longitude 128脗掳52芒聙虏59芒聙鲁 West;
Thence easterly in a straight line to a point at latitude 62脗掳31芒聙虏48芒聙鲁 North and longitude 128脗掳51芒聙虏00芒聙鲁 West;
Thence southeasterly in a straight line to a point at latitude 62脗掳27芒聙虏32芒聙鲁 North and longitude 128脗掳44芒聙虏42芒聙鲁 West;
Thence southeasterly in a straight line to a point at latitude 62脗掳27芒聙虏04芒聙鲁 North and longitude 128脗掳38芒聙虏56芒聙鲁 West;
Thence southeasterly in a straight line to a point at latitude 62脗掳25芒聙虏34芒聙鲁 North and longitude 128脗掳30芒聙虏32芒聙鲁 West;
Thence southeasterly in a straight line to a point on a southerly boundary of the Sahtu Settlement Area at longitude 128脗掳21芒聙虏47芒聙鲁 West and approximate latitude 62脗掳21芒聙虏49芒聙鲁 North;
Thence northeasterly along the southerly boundary of the Sahtu Settlement Area to a point at longitude 127脗掳23芒聙虏09芒聙鲁 West and approximate latitude 62脗掳37芒聙虏00芒聙鲁 North;
Thence northwesterly in a straight line to a point at latitude 62脗掳38芒聙虏56芒聙鲁 North and longitude 127脗掳28芒聙虏34芒聙鲁 West;
Thence northwesterly in a straight line to a point at latitude 62脗掳39芒聙虏18芒聙鲁 North and longitude 127脗掳30芒聙虏18芒聙鲁 West;
Thence northerly in a straight line to a point at latitude 62脗掳40芒聙虏48芒聙鲁 North and longitude 127脗掳30芒聙虏22芒聙鲁 West;
Thence northeasterly in a straight line to a point at latitude 62脗掳42芒聙虏25芒聙鲁 North and longitude 127脗掳28芒聙虏01芒聙鲁 West;
Thence northeasterly in a straight line to a point at latitude 62脗掳43芒聙虏12芒聙鲁 North and longitude 127脗掳27芒聙虏29芒聙鲁 West;
Thence northwesterly in a straight line to a point at latitude 62脗掳43芒聙虏52芒聙鲁 North and longitude 127脗掳28芒聙虏55芒聙鲁 West;
Thence westerly in a straight line to a point at latitude 62脗掳44芒聙虏02芒聙鲁 North and longitude 127脗掳31芒聙虏05芒聙鲁 West;
Thence southwesterly in a straight line to a point at latitude 62脗掳43芒聙虏23芒聙鲁 North and longitude 127脗掳35芒聙虏31芒聙鲁 West;
Thence northwesterly in a straight line to a point at latitude 62脗掳44芒聙虏46芒聙鲁 North and longitude 127脗掳36芒聙虏25芒聙鲁 West;
Thence northwesterly in a straight line to a point at latitude 62脗掳45芒聙虏43芒聙鲁 North and longitude 127脗掳37芒聙虏37芒聙鲁 West;
Thence northwesterly in a straight line to a point at latitude 62脗掳46芒聙虏23芒聙鲁 North and longitude 127脗掳39芒聙虏00芒聙鲁 West;
Thence northwesterly in a straight line to a point at latitude 62脗掳49芒聙虏26芒聙鲁 North and longitude 127脗掳39芒聙虏54芒聙鲁 West;
Thence northerly in a straight line to a point at latitude 62脗掳51芒聙虏12芒聙鲁 North and longitude 127脗掳39芒聙虏28芒聙鲁 West;
Thence westerly in a straight line to a point at latitude 62脗掳50芒聙虏56芒聙鲁 North and longitude 127脗掳46芒聙虏29芒聙鲁 West;
Thence northwesterly in a straight line to a point at latitude 62脗掳53芒聙虏07芒聙鲁 North and longitude 127脗掳52芒聙虏51芒聙鲁 West;

Thence northwesterly in a straight line to a point at latitude 63脗掳01芒聙虏44芒聙鲁 North and longitude 128脗掳09芒聙虏07芒聙鲁 West;

Thence westerly in a straight line to a point at latitude 63脗掳02芒聙虏02芒聙鲁 North and longitude 128脗掳14芒聙虏31芒聙鲁 West;
Thence southwesterly in a straight line to a point at latitude 63脗掳01芒聙虏16芒聙鲁 North and longitude 128脗掳16芒聙虏08芒聙鲁 West;

Thence westerly in a straight line to a point at latitude 63脗掳01芒聙虏05芒聙鲁 North and longitude 128脗掳33芒聙虏36芒聙鲁 West;
Thence southerly in a straight line to a point at latitude 62脗掳59芒聙虏53芒聙鲁 North and longitude 128脗掳33芒聙虏29芒聙鲁 West;

Thence southeasterly in a straight line to a point at latitude 62脗掳54芒聙虏22芒聙鲁 North and longitude 128脗掳29芒聙虏28芒聙鲁 West;
Thence southeasterly in a straight line to a point at latitude 62脗掳52芒聙虏16芒聙鲁 North and longitude 128脗掳28芒聙虏08芒聙鲁 West;
Thence southwesterly in a straight line to a point at latitude 62脗掳51芒聙虏29芒聙鲁 North and longitude 128脗掳29芒聙虏31芒聙鲁 West;
Thence southeasterly in a straight line to a point at latitude 62脗掳50芒聙虏24芒聙鲁 North and longitude 128脗掳27芒聙虏22芒聙鲁 West;
Thence southerly in a straight line to a point at latitude 62脗掳44芒聙虏42芒聙鲁 North and longitude 128脗掳25芒聙虏44芒聙鲁 West;
Thence southwesterly in a straight line to a point at latitude 62脗掳43芒聙虏01芒聙鲁 North and longitude 128脗掳33芒聙虏18芒聙鲁 West;
Thence northwesterly in a straight line to a point at latitude 62脗掳43芒聙虏37芒聙鲁 North and longitude 128脗掳43芒聙虏34芒聙鲁 West;
Thence southwesterly in a straight line to a point at latitude 62脗掳41芒聙虏10芒聙鲁 North and longitude 128脗掳45芒聙虏29芒聙鲁 West;
Thence westerly in a straight line to a point at latitude 62脗掳40芒聙虏34芒聙鲁 North and longitude 128脗掳51芒聙虏40芒聙鲁 West;
Thence northwesterly in a straight line to a point at latitude 62脗掳44芒聙虏46芒聙鲁 North and longitude 128脗掳55芒聙虏55芒聙鲁 West;

Thence northwesterly in a straight line to a point at latitude 62脗掳48芒聙虏32芒聙鲁 North and longitude 129脗掳04芒聙虏59芒聙鲁 West;
Thence northwesterly in a straight line to a point at latitude 62脗掳51芒聙虏25芒聙鲁 North and longitude 129脗掳06芒聙虏04芒聙鲁 West;
Thence northeasterly in a straight line to a point at latitude 62脗掳55芒聙虏52芒聙鲁 North and longitude 129脗掳04芒聙虏23芒聙鲁 West;
Thence northeasterly in a straight line to a point at latitude 62脗掳56芒聙虏15芒聙鲁 North and longitude 129脗掳02芒聙虏54芒聙鲁 West;
Thence northeasterly in a straight line to a point at latitude 62脗掳58芒聙虏43芒聙鲁 North and longitude 129脗掳01芒聙虏19芒聙鲁 West;
Thence northerly in a straight line to a point at latitude 62脗掳59芒聙虏10芒聙鲁 North and longitude 129脗掳01芒聙虏20芒聙鲁 West;
Thence northwesterly in a straight line to a point at latitude 62脗掳59芒聙虏15芒聙鲁 North and longitude 129脗掳01芒聙虏26芒聙鲁 West;
Thence southwesterly in a straight line to a point at latitude 62脗掳59芒聙虏14芒聙鲁 North and longitude 129脗掳01芒聙虏43芒聙鲁 West;
Thence northwesterly in a straight line to a point at latitude 62脗掳59芒聙虏15芒聙鲁 North and longitude 129脗掳02芒聙虏05芒聙鲁 West;
Thence southwesterly in a straight line to a point at latitude 62脗掳59芒聙虏12芒聙鲁 North and longitude 129脗掳02芒聙虏16芒聙鲁 West;
Thence northwesterly in a straight line to a point at latitude 62脗掳59芒聙虏22芒聙鲁 North and longitude 129脗掳02芒聙虏19芒聙鲁 West;
Thence northwesterly in a straight line to a point at latitude 62脗掳59芒聙虏25芒聙鲁 North and longitude 129脗掳02芒聙虏29芒聙鲁 West;
Thence northerly in a straight line to a point at latitude 62脗掳59芒聙虏34芒聙鲁 North and longitude 129脗掳02芒聙虏30芒聙鲁 West;
Thence northwesterly in a straight line to the intersection of the ordinary high water mark of O芒聙聶Grady Lake and longitude 129脗掳02芒聙虏44芒聙鲁 West at approximate latitude 62脗掳59芒聙虏38芒聙鲁 North;
Thence following the said ordinary high water mark generally westerly to its intersection with longitude 129脗掳03芒聙虏11芒聙鲁 West at approximate latitude 62脗掳59芒聙虏37芒聙鲁 North;

Thence northwesterly in a straight line to the intersection of the ordinary high water mark of an unnamed island in O芒聙聶Grady Lake and longitude 129脗掳03芒聙虏29芒聙鲁 West at approximate latitude 62脗掳59芒聙虏40芒聙鲁 North;
Thence following the ordinary high water mark of said island generally northwesterly to its intersection with longitude 129脗掳03芒聙虏42芒聙鲁 West at approximate latitude 62脗掳59芒聙虏49芒聙鲁 North;

Said parcel containing an area of approximately 4,380 square kilometres.

All coordinates are referred to the 1983 North American Datum, Canadian Spatial Reference System (NAD83 CSRS) and any references to straight lines mean points joined directly on the NAD83 Universal Transverse Mercator (UTM) projection plane surface.
Published under authority of the Senate of Canada
